system.description:
Engulf a target persona in a corrupting datastreams. If the sprite beats the target in a Cracking + RES vs. INT + FW test, the target is enveloped in a hail of pulses.

With the first successful attack and on each subsequent action you perform while sustaining this power, it inflicts (Resonance) DV Matrix damage, resisted as normal.

The storm also causes 2 levels of noise for the target. If you take any Matrix damage, all of your electron storms end immediately.
